mnemonics.title: Signal Number Memory Aid
mnemonics.content: SIGKILL (9): 'KILL' has 4 letters, 9 is the next number after 4+5. SIGTERM (15): 'TERMINATE' has 9 letters, 15 is 9+6. SIGINT (2): 'INTERRUPT' has 9 letters, but Ctrl+C is two keys.

mnemonics.title: sigaction Flags
mnemonics.content: SA_RESTART: R for Restart system calls. SA_SIGINFO: S for Signal Info provides extra information. SA_NOCLDWAIT: N for No Child Wait behavior.
